provenance: Schema-derived from autotune_runs table legacy rows. Rows written before the Sharpe-metric columns existed have NULL for naive_sharpe, selection_tstat (the post-D3 column, formerly deflated_sharpe), and frozen_eval_sharpe. This fixture exercises the None-graceful path in all surfacing code.
description: Legacy autotune run row where naive_sharpe, selection_tstat, and frozen_eval_sharpe are all NULL. The surfacing layer must render a placeholder string ('N/A' or '—') for each, never crash.
